part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - 84 mm - Suzuki
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.bullet1: High-quality products for long-term reliability

part.bullet5: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Quality materials developed for maximum performance tolerances and longevity
part.bullet2: MLS (Mutli-Layer Steel) head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface utilizing LCE (Load Control Embossments), providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: Single-Layer Steel (SLS) gaskets feature a stainless steel core and embossed outer surfaces that create a heavy-duty seal between the center steel layer and the gasket mating surfaces
part.bullet4: Center or shim layer is uncoated stainless steel, which can be varied to accommodate multiple thickness requirements
part.bullet5: Outer layers are embossed and coated on both sides with Viton to meet the demands of a variety of harsh sealing environments, load conditions, and surface finishes

part.bullet1: Contains all gaskets and seals needed
part.bullet2: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Gasket material and construction will vary by application to ensure longevity with leak free performance under all conditions
part.bullet2: 4-stroke applications utilize a double-sided Viton® rubber-coated stainless steel gasket providing precise, high-temperature sealing capabilities in all conditions
part.bullet3: Exhaust gasket kit are made for extreme temperatures, utilizing a steel-tanged outer layer that bites into the Armor-400 inner layer (heat-resistant to 1,800ºF), providing ultimate strength from blow-outs or push-outs created by over-torqued situations
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Clutch cover gaskets are made form an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core
part.bullet2: Aluminum core gives the gasket strength for a superior seal and prevents the gasket from weeping or crawling out in today's engine cases with limited sealing surfaces
part.bullet3: No sealants required for installation
part.bullet4: Save service time as AFM will not stick to the engine case making replacement quick and easy, no more scraping
part.bullet5: AFM is a compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core with a high temperature resistance of more than 250°F; it has an 85% recovery while maintaining a strong torque retention
part.bullet6: No gasket sealants or silicone bead is required, re-torque is also not required

part.bullet1: Stator cover gaskets are made from an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core
part.bullet2: Magneto cover gaskets are made from EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) material instead of fiber

part.bullet4: No gasket sealants or silicone bead is required, re-torque is also not required

part.bullet6: AFM is a compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core with a high temperature resistance of more than 250°F; it has an 85% recovery while maintaining a strong torque retention

part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - 48.5 mm Stock - Kawasaki
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.bullet1: Clutch cover gaskets are made form an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core

part.bullet1: Quality materials developed for maximum performance tolerances and longevity
part.bullet2: MLS (Mutli-Layer Steel) head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface utilizing LCE (Load Control Embossments), providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: Single-Layer Steel (SLS) gaskets feature a stainless steel core and embossed outer surfaces that create a heavy-duty seal between the center steel layer and the gasket mating surfaces
part.bullet4: Center or shim layer is uncoated stainless steel, which can be varied to accommodate multiple thickness requirements
part.bullet5: Outer layers are embossed and coated on both sides with Viton to meet the demands of a variety of harsh sealing environments, load conditions, and surface finishes

part.partDescription: Top End EST Gasket Kit - 96 mm - Yamaha
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - 95 mm - KTM/Polaris
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - 77 mm - Kawasaki/Suzuki
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.bullet1: Bottom end gasket kits include correct oil seals, O-rings, drain plug washers and water pump cover gaskets as needed
part.bullet2: Materials will vary depending on what is correct and engineered for specified application
part.bullet3: Purchase a top and a bottom end gasket kit for a complete gasket kit when doing a total engine rebuild
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Clutch cover gaskets are made form an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core
part.bullet2: Aluminum core gives the gasket strength for a superior seal and prevents the gasket from weeping or crawling out in today's engine cases with limited sealing surfaces
part.bullet3: No sealants required for installation
part.bullet4: Save service time as AFM will not stick to the engine case making replacement quick and easy, no more scraping
part.bullet5: AFM is a compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core with a high temperature resistance of more than 250°F; it has an 85% recovery while maintaining a strong torque retention
part.bullet6: No gasket sealants or silicone bead is required, re-torque is also not required

part.bullet2: Magneto cover gaskets are made from EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) material instead of fiber

part.bullet1: Gasket material and construction will vary by application to ensure longevity with leak free performance under all conditions
part.bullet2: 4-stroke applications utilize a double-sided Viton® rubber-coated stainless steel gasket providing precise, high-temperature sealing capabilities in all conditions
part.bullet3: Exhaust gasket kit are made for extreme temperatures, utilizing a steel-tanged outer layer that bites into the Armor-400 inner layer (heat-resistant to 1,800ºF), providing ultimate strength from blow-outs or push-outs created by over-torqued situations
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: MLX Gasket (Multi-Layer-Xtreme) features an extra “stopper” fold-over layer providing a torque limiting surface that prevents yielding of the combustion seal
part.bullet2: Proprietary high-temperature coatings along with embossments provide a micro seal for fluids against the head and block surface
part.bullet3: MLX head gaskets are essential for all Milwaukee 8 applications using a Turbo, high compression, nitrous or any power adder modifications
part.bullet4: Require no special machining and are installed like a regular MLS head gasket
part.bullet5: High-quality products for long-term reliability
part.bullet6: Fit air/oil cooled and Twin cooled heads
part.bullet7: Sold in pairs for popular bores and thicknesses

part.bullet3: MLX head gaskets are essential for all Milwaukee 8 applications using a Turbo, high compression, nitrous or any power adder modifications

part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - KTM/Husqvarna/Gas Gas
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.bullet1: Kit features Multi-Layer Steel (MLS) gaskets and two outer Viton®-coated embossed spring steel layers with an inner steel layer to provide additional support
part.bullet2: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Quality materials developed for maximum performance tolerances and longevity
part.bullet2: MLS (Mutli-Layer Steel) head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface utilizing LCE (Load Control Embossments), providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: Single-Layer Steel (SLS) gaskets feature a stainless steel core and embossed outer surfaces that create a heavy-duty seal between the center steel layer and the gasket mating surfaces
part.bullet4: Center or shim layer is uncoated stainless steel, which can be varied to accommodate multiple thickness requirements
part.bullet5: Outer layers are embossed and coated on both sides with Viton to meet the demands of a variety of harsh sealing environments, load conditions, and surface finishes

part.bullet1: Clutch cover gaskets are made form an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core
part.bullet2: Aluminum core gives the gasket strength for a superior seal and prevents the gasket from weeping or crawling out in today's engine cases with limited sealing surfaces
part.bullet3: No sealants required for installation
part.bullet4: Save service time as AFM will not stick to the engine case making replacement quick and easy, no more scraping
part.bullet5: AFM is a compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core with a high temperature resistance of more than 250°F; it has an 85% recovery while maintaining a strong torque retention
part.bullet6: No gasket sealants or silicone bead is required, re-torque is also not required

part.bullet3: Exhaust gasket kit are made for extreme temperatures, utilizing a steel-tanged outer layer that bites into the Armor-400 inner layer (heat-resistant to 1,800ºF), providing ultimate strength from blow-outs or push-outs created by over-torqued situations
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Clutch cover gaskets are made form an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core
part.bullet2: Aluminum core gives the gasket strength for a superior seal and prevents the gasket from weeping or crawling out in today's engine cases with limited sealing surfaces
part.bullet3: No sealants required for installation
part.bullet4: Save service time as AFM will not stick to the engine case making replacement quick and easy, no more scraping
part.bullet5: AFM is a compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core with a high temperature resistance of more than 250°F; it has an 85% recovery while maintaining a strong torque retention
part.bullet6: No gasket sealants or silicone bead is required, re-torque is also not required

part.bullet1: Valve cover gaskets are made from application specific materials to ensure longevity and correct fitment for a leak free seal

part.bullet3: Made from AFM or thick fiber material depending on application
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - 96 mm - Suzuki
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.bullet3: Purchase a top and a bottom end gasket kit for a complete gasket kit when doing a total engine rebuild

part.bullet1: Quality materials developed for maximum performance tolerances and longevity
part.bullet2: MLS (Mutli-Layer Steel) head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface utilizing LCE (Load Control Embossments), providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: Single-Layer Steel (SLS) gaskets feature a stainless steel core and embossed outer surfaces that create a heavy-duty seal between the center steel layer and the gasket mating surfaces
part.bullet4: Center or shim layer is uncoated stainless steel, which can be varied to accommodate multiple thickness requirements
part.bullet5: Outer layers are embossed and coated on both sides with Viton to meet the demands of a variety of harsh sealing environments, load conditions, and surface finishes

part.bullet1: Gasket material and construction will vary by application to ensure longevity with leak free performance under all conditions

part.bullet3: Exhaust gasket kit are made for extreme temperatures, utilizing a steel-tanged outer layer that bites into the Armor-400 inner layer (heat-resistant to 1,800ºF), providing ultimate strength from blow-outs or push-outs created by over-torqued situations

part.bullet1: Quality materials developed for maximum performance tolerances and longevity
part.bullet2: MLS (Mutli-Layer Steel) head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface utilizing LCE (Load Control Embossments), providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: Single-Layer Steel (SLS) gaskets feature a stainless steel core and embossed outer surfaces that create a heavy-duty seal between the center steel layer and the gasket mating surfaces
part.bullet4: Center or shim layer is uncoated stainless steel, which can be varied to accommodate multiple thickness requirements
part.bullet5: Outer layers are embossed and coated on both sides with Viton to meet the demands of a variety of harsh sealing environments, load conditions, and surface finishes

part.bullet1: Clutch cover gaskets are made form an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core

part.bullet3: No sealants required for installation

part.bullet5: AFM is a compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core with a high temperature resistance of more than 250°F; it has an 85% recovery while maintaining a strong torque retention
part.bullet6: No gasket sealants or silicone bead is required, re-torque is also not required

part.partDescription: Top End EST Gasket Kit - 96 mm - Honda
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power

part.bullet1: Quality materials developed for maximum performance tolerances and longevity
part.bullet2: MLS (Mutli-Layer Steel) head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface utilizing LCE (Load Control Embossments), providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: Single-Layer Steel (SLS) gaskets feature a stainless steel core and embossed outer surfaces that create a heavy-duty seal between the center steel layer and the gasket mating surfaces
part.bullet4: Center or shim layer is uncoated stainless steel, which can be varied to accommodate multiple thickness requirements
part.bullet5: Outer layers are embossed and coated on both sides with Viton to meet the demands of a variety of harsh sealing environments, load conditions, and surface finishes

part.bullet1: Cometic's proprietary AFM (Aluminum Foamette Material) gaskets feature an aluminum core with a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to the outside
part.bullet2: Gaskets have resistance to temperatures of more than 205°F
part.bullet3: Have an 85% shape-recovering while maintaining strong torque retention - ideal gasket material for machined surfaces
part.bullet4: Kit includes all gaskets, seals and O-rings required for both the inner and outer primary
part.bullet5: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - 91 mm - Honda
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.partDescription: Head Gasket - Standard - 3.500" x .030" - '84-'99 EVO/'88-'22 XL 1200
part.bullet1: High-quality products for long-term reliability
part.bullet2: Manufactured from premium fuel-resistant materials that will not creep, crack or become brittle
part.bullet3: CFM is a composite material with a steel tang center laminated to provide excellent heat tolerance without delaminating while providing a long lasting seal
part.bullet4: Multi-Layer Steel (MLS) gasket features two outer Viton®-coated embossed spring steel layers with an inner steel layer to provide additional support
part.bullet5: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Clutch cover gaskets are made form an AFM Material which is a chemically blown, compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core
part.bullet2: Aluminum core gives the gasket strength for a superior seal and prevents the gasket from weeping or crawling out in today's engine cases with limited sealing surfaces
part.bullet3: No sealants required for installation
part.bullet4: Save service time as AFM will not stick to the engine case making replacement quick and easy, no more scraping
part.bullet5: AFM is a compounded nitrile synthetic rubber bonded to an aluminum core with a high temperature resistance of more than 250°F; it has an 85% recovery while maintaining a strong torque retention
part.bullet6: No gasket sealants or silicone bead is required, re-torque is also not required

part.partDescription: Top End Gasket Kit - 92 mm - Can-Am
part.bullet1: Top end gasket kit includes correct base, head gasket and cylinder O-rings as well as other top end specific O-rings or seals needed for R&R of top end
part.bullet2: MLS head gaskets promote an even torque load across the gasket sealing surface, providing less bore distortion and better piston ring seal for more power
part.bullet3: 4-stroke head gaskets are made to perform on today’s highest-output 4-stroke naturally aspirated and boosted machines, utilizing a multi-layered steel design with the outer layers being embossed and coated with a Viton rubber coating; these head gaskets are designed to meet the demands of today's high-horsepower, high-cylinder-pressure engines
part.bullet4: EST (Extreme Sealing Technology) gasket kit includes embossed stainless steel head, base and rocker gaskets covered with a proprietary rubber material
part.bullet5: Head gasket material allows heat to be drawn away from the combustion ring and dissipated evenly across the gasket surface to eliminate hot spots and gasket failure

part.bullet1: MLX Gasket (Multi-Layer-Xtreme) features an extra “stopper” fold-over layer providing a torque limiting surface that prevents yielding of the combustion seal
part.bullet2: Proprietary high-temperature coatings along with embossments provide a micro seal for fluids against the head and block surface
part.bullet3: MLX head gaskets are essential for all Milwaukee 8 applications using a Turbo, high compression, nitrous or any power adder modifications
part.bullet4: Require no special machining and are installed like a regular MLS head gasket
part.bullet5: High-quality products for long-term reliability
part.bullet6: Fit air/oil cooled and Twin cooled heads
part.bullet7: Sold in pairs for popular bores and thicknesses
